---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What problem would this solve?**
The use case or limitation you're running into.

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like the control to do.

**Alternatives considered**
Any workarounds you've tried.

**Additional context**
Anything else (mock-ups, similar controls, etc.).
